gates.gate_question: Is the public wording limited to sandbox readiness discussion only
gates.readiness_signal: Scope says public preview and not for clinical use
gates.required_next_evidence: owner reviewed outward wording before any external route

gates.gate_question: Does the artifact avoid patient data and live care records
gates.readiness_signal: Synthetic only statement is visible in the artifact
gates.required_next_evidence: separate data governance review before any real data discussion

gates.gate_question: Are human review roles and escalation paths stated before any pilot language
gates.readiness_signal: Clinician review is described as a required gate
gates.required_next_evidence: named review role and escalation record after owner clearance

gates.gate_question: Is ethics status described as a source checked gate rather than approval
gates.readiness_signal: Ethics wording blocks approval and national rule claims
gates.required_next_evidence: source verified ethics route before submission language

gates.gate_question: Are audit logs, source support, and failure modes separated from endpoint results
gates.readiness_signal: Evidence fields are listed without endpoint result language
gates.required_next_evidence: read only validation log for each public artifact

gates.gate_question: Is any public action kept below application, access, or endorsement language
gates.readiness_signal: Owner clearance is required before external contact or sandbox application
gates.required_next_evidence: explicit owner decision before any application step
